global_description: A small, agile songbird with a slender body and short tail. It features striking black and orange plumage, with a glossy black head and back, and bright orange patches on the sides and wings. The underparts are white, and the wings are rounded.

part_details.head: Glossy black, small and rounded.
part_details.wings: Rounded, black with bright orange patches.
part_details.tail: Short, black with orange at the base.

spatial_relations: The orange wing patches are located centrally on the black wings.
The short tail extends from the lower back.
The white underparts are below the black back.
